evidence_markers: ValueError: Item identifier is not valid: 5
expected_fix: Ensure that only valid item identifiers are included in the order items.
reasoning_summary: The root cause of the failure is in the `retrieve_items` function, which incorrectly included a non-string item identifier (5) in the order items list. This invalid identifier was then passed to the `verify_stock` function, leading to a ValueError when it attempted to validate the stock for the items.
